summary: Corrected project team labels, tightened project linkage to Airtable record ids, moved study reads into the existing studies service, seeded preview D1 with linked studies, and changed Study navigation to use the Study record ID as the canonical page URL.

task.request: Fix linked Project dashboard records and Study routing. Use the existing studies service, seed D1 where Airtable is rate-limited, and support legacy pid/sid URLs only where they resolve to the correct linked records.

decisions.decision: Use Airtable record ids beginning rec as canonical project identifiers.
decisions.reason: The live API, D1 project cache and Airtable evidence showed that Project dashboard traversal must use Airtable record ids, not PID-style local identifiers.
The repository already has a bounded studies service. A separate study-record-routes file would duplicate responsibility and muddy the service catalogue.

decisions.decision: Use /pages/study/?id=<study-record-id> as the canonical Study page route.
decisions.reason: A Study belongs to a Project. The Study record already carries the linked Project record ID, so the project id does not need to be duplicated in the Study page URL.

decisions.decision: Support legacy pid/sid URLs only if they resolve and the linked Project record matches the pid value.
decisions.reason: A legacy URL that cannot prove the Study belongs to the Project is unsafe and should show an error instead of attempting a best-effort load.

decisions.decision: Expose study-load failure on the dashboard instead of rendering No studies yet.
decisions.reason: No studies yet must mean a successful empty response. It must not mask a 429, 503, bad link field or empty cache.

decisions.decision: Seed the preview D1 studies cache from repository evidence while Airtable is rate-limited.
decisions.reason: The project-studies fixture contains the two known studies linked to Test Project 1. Airtable remains rate-limited in preview, so the preview D1 cache needs an authorised seed to make the dashboard work.

decisions.decision: Allow seeded Project Studies IDs that are rec-prefixed but shorter than Airtable's current 17-character record-id pattern.
decisions.reason: The repository Project Studies fixture uses study identifiers rect3biqr and rect3o7dt. The cache must not reject these known linked study identifiers while still requiring project links to be full Airtable Project record IDs.

changes: Project cards now render the API team label rather than suppressing Home Office Biometrics.
Impact writes now default to a linked Project field and reject non-Airtable project ids.

studies.js now validates project ids, paginates Airtable list records, tolerates multiple linked-project field names, syncs successful Airtable reads into rops_studies_cache, and reads D1 before Airtable unless refresh=1 is used.
studies.js now supports single Study lookup through /api/studies?id=<study-record-id>, returning the linked projectId from D1 or Airtable.
studies.js now allows rec-prefixed study identifiers from the seeded Project Studies fixture while continuing to require full rec project identifiers for project linkage.
project-dashboard.js now emits canonical Study links as /pages/study/?id=<study-record-id> instead of /pages/study/?pid=<project-record-id>&sid=<study-record-id>.
study-page.js now resolves the Study page from the Study record ID, derives projectId from the Study record, and only accepts pid/sid legacy URLs when the loaded Study record's projectId equals pid.
study-page.js now uses same-origin API calls for Pages previews instead of forcing the production API Worker on pages.dev hosts.
worker.js routes /api/studies through the service layer before the legacy core router can use its direct handler.
worker.js exposes /api/_diag/project-linked-records?project=rec... for project-linked study diagnostics.
project-dashboard.js renders a clear studies error region when linked studies cannot be loaded.
infra/cloudflare/migrations/preview/0002_seed_projects_cache.sql creates rops_studies_cache and seeds two Test Project 1 studies linked to recgdpwEI5hFO7bUZ.
tests/studies-route-contract.test.js pins the canonical Study URL, single-study API lookup, legacy-route match guard, and preview studies seed contract.
risks: Airtable is still rate-limited in preview. The seeded D1 studies are intended to preserve preview dashboard behaviour while Airtable is unavailable.
The seeded study identifiers come from repository fixture data rather than a fresh Airtable API read because Airtable is currently returning 429.
The legacy direct studies handler still exists inside core/router.js for fallback contexts, but Worker entrypoint intercepts /api/studies before it is reached in the active preview Worker path.
The preview seed is not a production migration and must not be treated as the long-term source of truth. A successful Airtable read should refresh the D1 cache when rate limits clear.

Downstream study subpages still use pid/sid for context. The Study landing page now derives project context from id, but child pages need a separate migration if the same canonical route style is required everywhere.
nextValidationTargets: Confirm all checks on the new trace head.
Confirm Deploy Passwordless Preview Worker applies the preview seed migration to remote D1.
Call /api/_diag/project-linked-records?project=recgdpwEI5hFO7bUZ on the branch preview and confirm d1.validStudyCount is 2.
Call /api/studies?id=rect3o7dt on the branch preview and confirm the response contains study.projectId = recgdpwEI5hFO7bUZ.
Reload /pages/project-dashboard/?id=recgdpwEI5hFO7bUZ and confirm Study links now point to /pages/study/?id=rect3o7dt and /pages/study/?id=rect3biqr.
Open /pages/study/?id=rect3o7dt and confirm the page renders the Diary Study with a working back link to /pages/project-dashboard/?id=recgdpwEI5hFO7bUZ.
Open the legacy URL /pages/study/?pid=recgdpwEI5hFO7bUZ&sid=rect3o7dt and confirm it only renders if the loaded Study record's projectId matches pid.
